manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Look at the guy at the bar telling the whole room about his fantasy football trade. Incredible. That's a type, isn't it.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: The genuine draw: sharp, dry, witty (Conflict1, charming surface); humor aimed OUTWARD at the world here, pure good company. The same observational edge that later barbs her is, early, just hilarious. She reads clever/intoxicating. The faint seam (the wit has teeth) dormant.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm not going to make a thing of it, life's too short. You want Thai, we get Thai. I'm easy.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Compliance-as-Surface-Veneer (Conflict1) PLUS humor: agreeableness reads as relief, the joke makes it charming. Contrast-with-combative-exes is the cover. She reads low-drama + funny. Residue (the resistance that goes underground instead of being voiced) dormant.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Oh, you're ready on time for once. I'm kidding. You look incredible, relax.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Hostility-as-Deniable-Package: a dig at her ('on time for once') instantly wrapped in 'kidding' + a compliment, so the barb is deniable. The test is real, the joke is the cover. She laughs it off, blames nothing. Residue (faint accumulating stings she can't name) dormant. CONTRAST: Toby's humor never has a target; Blake's grazes her then retreats.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I completely forgot to book it, I'm the worst. I'll sort it, promise. I owe you one.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Inaction-as-Weapon (early/deniable, Inconsistency9): the dropped ball, but humor disarms any objection ('crimes against you'). The charm is the deflection mechanism. She can't stay annoyed. Residue (chronic let-down she's joked out of protesting) dormant. CONTRAST w/ Toby: Toby's forgetting comes with sincere repair; Blake's comes with a deflecting joke.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: No, I'll handle it, I always do. It's fine. Don't mind me.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I keep it real, I'm not a fake-compliment guy.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I push the people I care about to be better.

manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Banter becomes a compliance test where she must absorb small cuts.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'll point out the one flaw nobody else mentions, it keeps people sharp.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Meanness can hide behind observation; he will frame judgments as neutral noticing.

manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He positions himself as authorized critic, making his cuts feel necessary.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like teasing people who can handle it.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He defines endurance of teasing as desirability; protest becomes failure.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm allergic to fake confidence.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He can puncture her confidence while claiming to expose falseness.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I notice when people try too hard.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: She becomes self-conscious and starts adjusting to avoid his judgment.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm not impressed by looks alone.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He can withhold basic attraction and make her prove additional worth.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I have high standards, but I make them fun.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Standards become a game she must keep playing to earn approval.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm the guy who notices the one thing off.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He will orient toward flaws, making her feel watched and corrected.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I don't hand out gold stars for breathing.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He withholds affirmation as principle, training her to work for praise.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm honest enough to be useful.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Usefulness becomes the excuse for unsolicited critique.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like keeping people humble.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Humbling people is direct confidence erosion packaged as charm.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm attracted to women who can take a joke.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He makes tolerance for disrespect part of attractiveness.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I don't worship anyone, I keep things grounded.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Grounded becomes an excuse to avoid warmth and introduce diminishment.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want a confident woman who can take a joke.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is screening for a target who will absorb cruel insults and negging disguised as humor.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need someone secure who doesn't need constant reassurance.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is establishing cover to withhold affection and validation, forcing her to chase his approval.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like a partner who's up for a little banter.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is testing her tolerance for continuous under-the-radar digs at her appearance or intelligence.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want a woman who isn't overly sensitive about little things.

manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is securing permission to be verbally cruel whenever he wants under the banner of honesty.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like someone who can laugh at her own expense sometimes.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is seeking a target who will cooperate in her own devaluation by laughing along with his cuts.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want a partner who is thick-skinned and grounded.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is pre-screening out targets who possess healthy boundaries and immediate self-respect mechanisms.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need a woman who knows how to keep me on my toes.
I like a girl who doesn't get defensive when I point things out.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is hunting for a compliant target who will internalize his critical jabs as accurate assessments.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want someone who can appreciate a very sarcastic sense of humor.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is setting up a permanent escape hatch to deny the malice behind his hostile comments.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need a partner who doesn't take herself too seriously.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is selecting for a target whose self-worth is low enough to accept consistent mocking.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm looking for a woman who can handle a bit of tough love.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is introducing a frame where emotional abuse is redefined as acts of loving care.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like a partner who knows how to roll with the punches.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is pre-screening for a target who will stay silent and endure escalating mistreatment.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want someone who doesn't expect me to walk on eggshells.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is demanding a license to unleash bad moods and insults without dealing with her boundaries.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need a woman who can tell the difference between honesty and malice.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is gaslighting her into believing her perception of his cruelty is a failure of her logic.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like a girl who doesn't need to be coddled constantly.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is setting an expectation that he will provide zero emotional warmth, comfort, or special treatment.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want a partner who can give as good as she gets.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is establishing a hostile baseline, framing mutual toxicity as an equal partnership.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need someone who can see the affection behind my teasing.

community_vocabulary.translation: He's asking country state and city — each signals dramatically different things
community_vocabulary.status_signal: North India vs South India is huge difference; Punjab signals one thing Tamil Nadu another; Lahore signals Pakistani; Mumbai cosmopolitan Indian; Dhaka Bangladeshi

community_vocabulary.translation: He's asking your surname — caste region and religion are all encoded in last names
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Patel signals Gujarati often merchant caste; Sharma signals Brahmin; Singh signals Sikh or Rajput; Khan signals Muslim; Banerjee signals Bengali Brahmin

community_vocabulary.translation: He's asking about your father's profession — major class signal
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Doctor engineer businessman are most common high-status answers

community_vocabulary.translation: He's asking your degree — STEM acceptable humanities loaded
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Medicine engineering law computer science are the acceptable canon

community_vocabulary.translation: He's asking which college or university specifically
community_vocabulary.status_signal: IIT IIM AIIMS signal Indian elite; US Ivy League signals immigration achievement

community_vocabulary.translation: He's asking about your migration generation
community_vocabulary.status_signal: 1965-act first-wave signals different from H1B 1990s wave from current migration

community_vocabulary.translation: He's checking intact-family status — divorce is loaded in South Asian families
He's asking about your diet which signals caste region and religion
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Strict vegetarianism often signals Brahmin Jain or specific community

community_vocabulary.translation: Hindus generally don't even if non-practicing — eating beef signals more assimilated or non-Hindu
Muslims don't — eating pork signals non-Muslim or non-practicing
He's asking about language — signals specific regional community
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Hindi/Urdu/Punjabi/Gujarati/Bengali/Tamil each signal different regional community

community_vocabulary.translation: Direct regional identification probe
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Each region carries distinct cultural complexes

community_vocabulary.snippet: Where in India are you from?
community_vocabulary.translation: He's asking state-level identity which matters intensely
community_vocabulary.status_signal: State-level identity often determines food language tradition

community_vocabulary.snippet: Did your parents have an arranged marriage?
community_vocabulary.translation: He's asking about family approach to marriage
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Arranged signals more traditional; semi-arranged middle ground; love marriage more modern

community_vocabulary.snippet: How did you meet your husband?
community_vocabulary.translation: He's asking whether arrangement was traditional
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Family-arranged signals traditional; family-introduced middle; organic more modern

community_vocabulary.translation: He's checking joint-family structure
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Living with in-laws signals traditional patrilocal; nuclear signals modern

community_vocabulary.translation: Family from Punjab (India or Pakistan)
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Carries reputation for outgoing-energy; often Sikh or Hindu; diaspora-prominent

community_vocabulary.translation: Family from Gujarat
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Carries reputation for business community; often merchant tradition

community_vocabulary.translation: Family from Bengal (India or Bangladesh)
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Carries reputation for intellectual literary tradition

community_vocabulary.translation: Family from Tamil Nadu Kerala Karnataka or Andhra
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Carries reputation for education focus and engineering tradition

community_vocabulary.translation: Bangladeshi family

community_vocabulary.translation: He practices Hinduism — major identity-and-cultural complex

community_vocabulary.translation: He practices Islam
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Religious identity overlapping with Pakistani/Bangladeshi/Indian Muslim background

community_vocabulary.translation: He's from priestly/scholarly caste background
